creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is finally fixed in main, by introducing a new version of the CTF format which lifts the type ID limitation (now one can have up to 2^{31} types, which ought to be enough for anybody.  The MFC period is somewhat conservative since it was a large changeset.
